# Provenance — vendored third-party source

This directory is a **verbatim snapshot of the World Orogen planet generator**,
the program that produced the dataset in `data/orogen_regions_full/`. It is kept
here as the reproducibility record for that data: it documents exactly which
version of the generator the export came from.

| | |
|---|---|
| Project | World Orogen |
| Live site | https://orogen.studio/ |
| Source repository | https://github.com/raguilar011095/planet_heightmap_generation |
| Author | raguilar011095 (see `humans.txt`) |
| License | **GNU General Public License v3.0** (see `LICENSE`) |
| Snapshot archive object | `f9bb081224ee80adea5bd1bb7c012d05786c4f9f` |
| Snapshot file date | 2026-04-15 |
| Retrieved into this repo | 2026-06 |

## License & attribution

The code in this directory is **not** ours. It is distributed under the GNU GPL
v3.0, which permits redistribution provided the license text and copyright
notices are preserved — they are kept intact in `LICENSE`. The rest of this
repository (the generated dataset and the analyses under `reports/`, `docs/`,
`tools/`, and `scripts/`) is a separate work, merely aggregated alongside this
snapshot; it is licensed independently (see the top-level `LICENSE`) and does not
extend, nor is it extended by, the GPL that governs this directory.

If you reuse this generator, do so under the terms of its GPL v3.0 and credit the
original author and project above. To get the canonical, maintained version,
prefer the upstream repository rather than this pinned snapshot.
